# shelly_emdata_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the EMData component instance.
- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `a_total_act_energy` (Number) Total active energy on phase A, Wh
- `a_total_act_ret_energy` (Number) Total active returned energy on phase A, Wh
- `b_total_act_energy` (Number) Total active energy on phase B, Wh
- `b_total_act_ret_energy` (Number) Total active returned energy on phase B, Wh
- `c_total_act_energy` (Number) Total active energy on phase C, Wh
- `c_total_act_ret_energy` (Number) Total active returned energy on phase C, Wh
- `total_act` (Number) Total active energy on all phases, Wh
- `total_act_ret` (Number) Total active returned energy on all phases, Wh
